title: WebcamMod-Forward-port-byAk4ai
description: Forward port of WebcamMod for Minecraft 1.21.8 (Fabric). Displays your webcam feed on your player in real time. Works on LAN and online servers. Original mod by Lichcodes, ported by ak4ai. Requires installation on both client and server.
body:
# 📷 WebcamMod - Forward Port

**Display your webcam feed on your Minecraft player in real time!**

---

![WebcamMod Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1463615/description_715fce26-d0f4-4114-aa22-8fc4361173a0.png)

---

## 🎯 About This Mod

This is a **forward port** of the original [WebcamMod](https://github.com/Lichcodes/WebcamMod) created by **Lichcodes**, updated to work with **Minecraft 1.21.8**.

The mod captures your webcam feed and displays it on your player's face in real-time. Perfect for content creators, streamers, and anyone who wants to add a personal touch to their Minecraft experience!

---

## 📸 Screenshots

| Webcam on player face | Settings menu | Multiplayer support |
|:---------------------:|:-------------:|:-------------------:|
| ![Screenshot 1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1463615/description_c9cf0964-72ca-4cd0-a69b-3b6e2a813c64.png) | ![Screenshot 2](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1463615/description_a47a5254-2227-48df-ac81-e33c8fb55ece.png) | ![Screenshot 3](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1463615/description_8bf5b09f-2f62-47e1-af39-f8056a1dd145.png) |

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎥 Real-Time Webcam Feed
Your webcam is displayed on your player's face in real-time with minimal latency.

### 🌐 Multiplayer Support
Works on LAN and online servers! Other players can see your webcam feed.

### ⚙️ Device Selection
Use `/webcam-settings` to choose which webcam device to use.

### 🔧 Easy Setup
Just install and play! No complex configuration needed.

---

## 📖 How to Use

1. **Install the mod** on both client and server (required for multiplayer)
2. **Launch Minecraft** with Fabric Loader
3. **Use the command** `/webcam-settings` to select your webcam device
4. **Enjoy!** Your webcam feed will appear on your player's face

---

## 📋 Requirements

| Requirement | Version |
|-------------|---------|
| Minecraft | **1.21.8** |
| Fabric Loader | **0.18.4+** |
| Fabric API | **0.136.1+** |
| Java | **21+** |

---

## ⚠️ Important Notice

> **🔒 Security Warning:**
> 
> This mod should **NOT** be used on public servers. Only use it with people you trust. It may be possible to send malicious payloads that could crash your game or cause other issues. **Use at your own risk.**

> **📡 Server/Client Mod:**
> 
> This mod must be installed on **both the client and server** for multiplayer functionality.

---
